{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Steel Dragon’s Mountain
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Steel Dragon’s Mountain]] is the origin of two [[Sages]] who created [[Blighted Sky]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
